final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing profile avatar for a self-media creator covering new energy vehicles, consumer electronics, and lifestyle products — suitable for both Chinese and international social platforms.

Style/medium: clean flat vector illustration, modern tech-lifestyle aesthetic, icon-grade clarity in the spirit of a polished app icon
Subject: a compact, friendly composition combining three symbolic elements — a sleek EV silhouette, a small glowing screen device, and a leaf or spark motif — arranged in a balanced triangular layout with generous negative space
Composition: centered square composition, equal visual weight on all three icons, 1:1 safe zone with 15% padding for platform cropping
Color palette: deep navy or charcoal as base, electric teal or sky blue as primary accent, warm amber or lime green as secondary accent — colors carry universal positive associations and avoid culturally sensitive combinations
Constraints: must read clearly at 64×64 px thumbnail size; monochrome version must remain legible; no human faces, no flags, no religious symbols, no country-specific iconography; culturally neutral across East Asian and Western audiences
Avoid: gradients that look dated; overly complex line art that collapses at small sizes; red-and-green combination (color-blind conflict); white-on-white elements; generic Behance flat-icon clichés; any brand logos or trademarked vehicle shapes
